title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Future Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
